description: A previous platform administrator partially configured the Rancher local cluster for multi-team access but left the setup incomplete and misconfigured before leaving the company. Using the target governance specification at /home/ga/Desktop/governance_spec.md, audit the current state, fix all misconfigurations, and complete the missing setup. The specification defines two Rancher Projects (platform-infra and team-alpha) with differentiated resource quotas, two custom Role Templates (a cluster-level Infrastructure Operator and a project-level Release Manager) with specific fine-grained permissions, and three users (ops-lead, alpha-lead, alpha-dev) with designated role assignments. Currently: the platform-infra project exists but has incorrect quota values, the team-alpha project is missing entirely, the Infrastructure Operator role template exists but is missing critical storage and event permissions, the Release Manager role template does not exist, user ops-lead exists but has an overly permissive Cluster Owner binding instead of Infrastructure Operator, and users alpha-lead and alpha-dev do not exist. Remediate all issues so the governance setup exactly matches the specification. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
